hero.title: Welcome to MoniqoPay Private Limited Company
hero.description: Our company offers reliable and innovative payment solutions. Our mission is to increase the revenue of companies and individual clients by implementing effective payment tools. Our goal is to provide the simplest possible payment solutions anywhere, anytime, to anyone, and in any currency.

tagline.text: MoniqoPay — simple solutions for Complex Challenges

partner.title: MoniqoPay is your reliable partner in the field of financial solutions
partner.subtitle: Ensuring confidence and security at each stage of your financial journey
partner.description: We offer innovative payment solutions that open new opportunities for your business and personal finances. Our team of experts cares about protecting your interests and ensuring the security of transactions. Let us become part of your financial success.

independent.title: Independent company
independent.text: International company specializing in high risk payments. We offer both international card acquiring and more than 100 local solutions in Europe, Latin America, Asia, the Middle East and countries of the CIS. The list of countries and solutions is constantly expanding. Personal approach to each client. Fast integration within 24 hours.

legal.privacyContent: MoniqoPay Private Limited Company respects your privacy. We collect and process personal data only as necessary to provide our payment services, respond to inquiries, and comply with applicable regulations. Contact data submitted through our forms is stored securely and used solely for communication purposes.
legal.termsContent: By using MoniqoPay services, you agree to our terms of service. Our payment solutions are provided subject to applicable laws and regulations. Integration timelines, supported geographies, and service levels are defined in individual agreements with each client.
